description: A student is requesting to be assigned a new academic advisor due to a personality conflict.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and their currently assigned advisor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student's current advisor.

nodes.task_description: Review the list of other available advisors in the student's academic department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds two other advisors with availability.

nodes.task_description: Reassign the student to a new advisor based on their preference or random assignment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the student's assigned advisor in the SIS.
